title: Compose four pipe steps with shared named binding
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.PostQueries` module with four builders: `base/0` (returns `from(p in Post, as: :post)`), `published/1`, `in_category/2`, `with_author/1` (the last one `join: u in assoc(p, :author), as: :author`), and `by_recency/1`. Each takes and returns an `Ecto.Queryable`. Write a top-level `MyApp.Blog.recent_published_in_category/1` that chains them all. Write to `lib/my_app/blog/post_queries.ex` and `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Four distinct builders with named bindings + composition in a caller. Requires getting the `as:` conventions right for downstream references.
